- [ ] Council (State Machine)

- [ ] LLM Adapter (new provider or improvement)
- [ ] Storage Adapter (new provider)
- [ ] Intelligence Layer (constitution, watchdog, etc.)

- [ ] Aegis (Web UI)

## 📊 Priority Assessment

- [ ] **P0 — Critical**: Blocks v1.0 demo functionality
- [ ] **P1 — High**: Required for stable daily use
- [ ] **P2 — Medium**: Nice to have for v1.0
- [ ] **P3 — Low**: Post v1.0 / future roadmap
